'''Cuthbern''' was a desolate wasted [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was known for its factories that produced extremely high quality weapons, including the [[StarAnvil heavy blaster rifle|Star Anvil]] blaster rifle. It was annexed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and its population was enslaved. It was later abandoned after a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack.
{{Moon-stub}}
